abstract: Comprehensive best practices guide for nuqs (type-safe URL query state management) in Next.js and other React frameworks, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Covers nuqs v2.5–v2.8 features including limitUrlUpdates (built-in debounce/throttle), key isolation, Standard Schema integration, defaultOptions on NuqsAdapter, processUrlSearchParams middleware, and the createLoader server utility. Contains 46 rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact from critical (parser configuration, adapter setup) to incremental (advanced patterns). Each rule includes detailed explanations, real-world examples comparing incorrect vs. correct implementations, and specific impact metrics to guide automated refactoring and code generation.
